name: plan-mirror
description: Blindly review, improve, and re-review technical plans against a confirmed project contract.

interface.shortDescription: Blind technical plan review with one safe revision.
interface.longDescription: Reviews a plan against a confirmed contract, optionally verifies an immutable repository snapshot, produces one improved candidate, and runs a fresh blind final review.
defaultPrompt: Review PLAN.md against a confirmed contract.
Check whether Plan Mirror can run safely.
